Name: ActivityCode
Description: Constants representing actions that can be tracked (counted) for various purposes.

Name: Archetype
Summary: Shared card name substrings supported by at least one card.
Description: Constants representing card [archetypes](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Archetype), i.e., shared name substrings that are supported by at least one card. These constants' values also correspond to the `setcode` values registered on card database files, as explained [here](https://projectignis.github.io/scrapi-book/guides/general/archetype.html).

Name: AssumptionProperty
Summary: Properties that a card is temporarily assumed to have.
Description: Constants representing properties a card is temporarily "assumed" to have inside a function scope.

Name: CardDeclarationOpcode
Summary: Operations for filtering card names that can be declared.
Description: Constants used with [`Duel.AnnounceCard`](/api/functions/Duel/AnnounceCard) as operations for filtering card names that can be declared. The operations, along with their operands, must be ordered in [Reverse Polish Notation](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Reverse_Polish_notation) (RPN).

Name: CardDeclarationType
Description: Constants representing different types of card name declaration (announcement), used as the `target_param` of [`Duel.SetOperationInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/SetOperationInfo) when the [category](/api/enums/EffectCategory) is [`CATEGORY_ANNOUNCE`](/api/constants/EffectCategory/CATEGORY_ANNOUNCE).

Name: CardHintType
Summary: Types of hints displayed on a card on hover.
Description: Constants representing strings ("hints") displayed when a player hovers over a card.

Name: CardPosition
Description: Constants representing a card's [position](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Position).

Name: CardStatus
Description: Constants representing statuses applied to a card (states a card is in).

Name: CardType
Description: Constants representing [card types](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Card_type).

Name: ChainInfo
Summary: Information related to a Chain Link.
Description: Constants used with [`Duel.GetChainInfo`](/api/functions/Duel/GetChainInfo) to specify which information related to a Chain Link to retrieve.

Name: Coin
Description: Constants representing results of coin flips.

Name: CommonCard
Summary: Passcodes of cards commonly used in scripts.
Description: Passcodes of cards commonly used in scripts, usually due to multiple support cards or a special handling involving the card.

Name: CommonCounter
Summary: Codes of counters commonly used in scripts.
Description: Codes of counters commonly used in scripts, usually due to multiple cards that support them.

Name: CommonOption
Summary: String IDs of options commonly used in scripts.
Description: String IDs of options commonly used in scripts as arguments to [`Duel.SelectOption`](/api/functions/Duel/SelectOption).

Name: CommonToken
Summary: Passcodes of tokens commonly used in scripts.
Description: Passcodes of tokens commonly used in scripts, usually due to multiple cards that support or Summon them.

Name: CounterModifier
Summary: Added to counter codes to modify their behavior.
Description: Constants that can be combined with counter codes (by adding them or using bitwise OR) to modify their behavior.

Name: CountLimitFlag
Description: Constants passed to [`Effect.SetCountLimit`](/api/functions/Effect/SetCountLimit) to modify the count limit behavior.

Name: DamageModifier
Description: Constants set as the [value](/api/functions/Effect/SetValue) of [effects that change battle damage](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_CHANGE_BATTLE_DAMAGE) and [piercing effects](/api/constants/EffectCode/EFFECT_PIERCE) to modify the amount of damage inflicted.

Name: DeckSequence
Summary: Constants for specifying the sequence in which cards are sent to in the Deck.
Description: Constants used as the sequence for [`Duel.SendtoDeck`](/api/functions/Duel/SendtoDeck) to specify the sequence (order) in which the cards will be sent to in the Deck.

Name: DuelOption
Description: Constants representing rules enforced in a Duel. These are usually set automatically depending on the type of Duel being played.

Name: EffectCategory
Description: Constants categorizing or describing activated effects, usually referring to possible actions that might be performed when resolving the effect.

Name: EffectCode
Description: Constants used with [`Effect.SetCode`](/api/functions/Effect/SetCode), usually representing non-activated effects applied to cards or players. An [`EFFECT_TYPE_SINGLE`](/api/constants/EffectType/EFFECT_TYPE_SINGLE) effect affects the card it is registered to. An [`EFFECT_TYPE_FIELD`](/api/constants/EffectType/EFFECT_TYPE_FIELD) effect with the [`EFFECT_FLAG_PLAYER_TARGET`](/api/constants/EffectFlag/EFFECT_FLAG_PLAYER_TARGET) flag affects the players specified in its [target range](/api/functions/Effect/SetTargetRange), while one without the flag affects cards in the target range that fulfill its [target function](/api/functions/Effect/SetTarget).

Name: EffectFlag
Description: Constants that modify the behavior of effects, set as the second argument of [`Effect.SetProperty`](/api/functions/Effect/SetProperty).

Name: EffectFlag2
Description: Additional constants that modify the behavior of effects, set as the third argument of [`Effect.SetProperty`](/api/functions/Effect/SetProperty). These serve the same purpose as regular [effect flags](/api/enums/EffectFlag), but had to be separated for technical reasons.

Name: EffectMarker
Summary: Constants for marking effects on registration.
Description: Marks an effect when [registering](/api/functions/Card/RegisterEffect) it to a card so it could be identified by other effects.

Name: EffectType
Description: Constants representing types of [effects](/api/types/Effect), which are set using [`Effect.SetType`](/api/functions/Effect/SetType).

Name: Event
Summary: Events that happen in a Duel.
Description: Constants representing events that happen in a Duel.

Name: FusionProcFlag
Description: Constants that modify the behavior of Fusion Summoning effects.

Name: GlobalFlag
Summary: Functionalities that are disabled by default.
Description: Constants representing certain functionalities that are disabled by default in Duels, usually to avoid executing potentially expensive code in Duels where they are not needed. They are enabled automatically when relevant effects are registered or when certain functions are called.

Name: HintMessage
Description: Constants for hints displayed to the player for various prompts.

Name: HintType
Description: Constants for types of hints displayed to the player for various prompts.

Name: LinkMarker
Description: Constants representing [Link Arrows](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Link_Arrow), historically referred to as "link markers" in the codebase.

Name: Location
Description: Constants representing locations in a Duel.

Name: LocationReason
Summary: Reasons for checking if a zone is available.
Description: Constants used as the reason for [`Duel.GetLocationCount`](/api/functions/Duel/GetLocationCount) when checking if a zone is available for a specific purpose.

Name: MonsterAttribute
Description: Constants representing monster [attributes](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Attribute).

Name: MonsterRace
Description: Constants representing [monster types](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Type), historically referred to as "races" in the codebase.

Name: Phase
Description: Constants representing the phases of a turn, along with their steps and substeps.

Name: Player
Description: Constants used to refer to players. These constants do not directly correspond to specific players (which are simply represented as `0` and `1`), but serve to indicate players in a more abstract sense.

Name: Reason
Summary: Reasons for actions performed in the game.
Description: Constants representing the reasons for actions performed in the game.

Name: RedirectLocation
Summary: Location constants that can only be used as redirection destination.
Description: Special location constants that can only be used as redirection destination, for texts such as `shuffled into the Deck instead of going to the GY` (e.g., ["Grave Protector"](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Grave_Protector)). Note that regular [location constants](/api/enums/Location) can also be used as destination.

Name: Reset
Description: Constants used to "reset" an effect, effectively removing it from the Duel such that it no longer applies and can no longer be used.

Name: RitualProcLevelType
Summary: Constants specifying how the total Levels of Ritual Materials are checked.
Description: Constants that specify how the total Levels of Ritual Materials used for a Ritual Summon should match the Ritual Monster's Level.

Name: SkillHint
Summary: Constants controlling the displayed Skill Card.
Description: Constants used as the hint type for [`Duel.Hint`](/api/functions/Duel/Hint) to control the displayed [Skill](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Skill) Card.

Name: SummonType
Description: Constants representing types of [Summons](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Summon).

Name: Timing
Summary: Timings when a fast effect will be prompted for activation.
Description: Constants to be used with [`Effect.SetHintTiming`](/api/functions/Effect/SetHintTiming) to specify different timings when a [fast effect](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Fast_effect) will be prompted for activation. By default, The EDOPro client does not prompt for activations at every timing a fast effect can be activated (unless the "Chain: ON" option is enabled) to minimize interruptions in the Duel.

Name: WinReason
Description: Constants representing [alternate victory conditions](https://yugipedia.com/wiki/Victory_condition#Alternate_victory_condition). The values also correspond to the victory strings displayed when the Duel ends.

Name: Zone
Description: Constants representing total values of individual zones on the field.
